pi_items.source: Direct inspection of ne_10m_rivers_lake_centerlines.dbf file - parsed DBF records to count Danube features

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the authentic Natural Earth Rivers & Lake Centerlines 10m resolution dataset (available at https://naciscdn.org/naturalearth/10m/physical/ne_10m_rivers_lake_centerlines.zip, file size ~2 MB). The Danube river is represented in this dataset and is 2,850 km long. With 20 km spacing, the expected number of perpendicular transects is ~142.5, making the specified range of 120-170 features reasonable. Each transect should be 10,000 meters (10 km) long with ±1,000 meter tolerance. The output should be exported as GeoJSON to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/danube_transects.geojson.
